ddls:
CREATE TABLE "software_packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software package */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the software */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the package was released */,
  "kind" TEXT /* Type of package (e.g., Source, Archive, Installer) */,
  "os" TEXT /* Operating system the package is compatible with */,
  "arch" TEXT /* Architecture the package is compatible with */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the file */,
  "sha256_checksum" TEXT /* SHA256 checksum for integrity verification */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the package is active */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the package has been verified */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user who uploaded the package */,
  "dependency_list" TEXT /* JSON column to store dependencies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_packages_kind FOREIGN KEY ("kind") REFERENCES package_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_packages_os FOREIGN KEY ("os") REFERENCES operating_systems ("os_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_packages_version FOREIGN KEY ("version") REFERENCES versions ("version_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_packages_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_packages_arch FOREIGN KEY ("arch") REFERENCES architectures ("arch_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the software */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., beta, stable, deprecated) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user who created the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_systems" (
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating system */,
  "os_name" TEXT /* Name of the operating system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operating system */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the operating system is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("os_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "architectures" (
  "arch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each architecture */,
  "arch_name" TEXT /* Name of the architecture */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the architecture */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the architecture is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the package type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the package type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Securely stored password */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the role is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "download_history" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download event */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being downloaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user downloading the package */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date when the package was downloaded */,
  "download_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the package was downloaded */,
  "downloaded_version" TEXT /* Version of the package downloaded */,
  "download_status" TEXT /* Status of the download (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "download_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempts made to download the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_download_history_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES software_packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_download_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the package file */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the file is active */,
  "is_encrypted" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the file is encrypted */,
  "encryption_key" TEXT /* Key used for encryption (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_files_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES software_packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "checksum_verifications" (
  "verification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each verification event */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being verified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the verification */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date when the verification was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the verification (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "log" TEXT /* Log of the verification process */,
  "verified_version" TEXT /* Version of the package verified */,
  "verified_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user who verified the package */,
  "verified_status" TEXT /* Status of the verification (e.g., success, failure, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("verification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_checksum_verifications_verified_by FOREIGN KEY ("verified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_checksum_verifications_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES software_packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_checksum_verifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package the metadata belongs to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the metadata is active */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user who created the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_metadata_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES software_packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_metadata_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
